name: SAIX Saudi Arabia Riyadh Route Servers
notes:
# **SAIX Saudi Arabia Route Servers**
SAIX operates two Route-Servers and It is advised to peer with both.

## **Route Server Address Information**
**RIX-RS1**
- 45.94.12.5
- 2001:1497::5

**RIX-RS2**
- 45.94.12.6
- 2001:1497::6

## **Route Server Control**
### **BGP Operational Communities:**
You have to use BGP Community to control route advertisement for dynamic filtering via the Route-Servers:
**SAIX support either BGP Standard-Community or Large-Community or combination of them**

- **Standard or Large Community (20759:20759) or (20759:1:0):**

 Route-Servers redistribute your prefixes to all (other) peers

- **Standard or Large Community (0:20759) or (20759:0:0):**
 
 Route-Servers wouldn’t redistribute your prefixes to any peer

- **Standard or Large Community (20759:20759) (0:PEER-AS1) (0:PEER-AS2) or (20759:1:0) (20759:0:PEER-AS1) (20759:0:PEER-AS2):**
 
 Route-Servers redistribute your prefixes to all (other) peers except PEER-AS1&PEER-AS2

- **Standard or Large Community (0:20759) (20759:PEER-AS1) (20759:PEER-AS2) or (20759:0:0) (20759:1:PEER-AS1) (20759:1:PEER-AS2):**

 Route-Servers redistribute your prefixes only to PEER-AS1&PEER-AS2

- **Standard and Large Community (20759:20759) (0:PEER-AS1) (20759:0:PEER-AS2):**

 Route-Servers redistribute your prefixes to all (other) peers except PEER-AS1&PEER-AS2
 
**For more information, please see:**

[Documents & Processes](https://www.saix.sa/members/documents-and-processes)
